title: Agentic Engineering
description: Build, orchestrate, and secure autonomous AI agents for real-world software delivery using Google Antigravity and the Tridorian standard.

courses.title: AGY-101: Secure Agentic Development: Installation & Setup (L100)
courses.description: Welcome to the foundational session of Google Antigravity (AGY). Before we can orchestrate AI agents to write code or execute terminal commands, we must establish a secure, working environment.

courses.title: AGY-102: The UI Landscape & Selection (L100)
courses.description: A comparative tour of the three major interfaces: the standalone visual board (antigravity), the command line (agy), and the workspace editor (antigravity-ide).

courses.title: AGY-103: Workspace Design & File Security (L100)
courses.description: Defining workspace boundaries (directory locking), setting up folder permissions, and building firewalls to protect sensitive personal folders.

courses.title: AGY-104: Agent-Human Collaboration Loops (L100)
courses.description: Constructing clear instructions, managing terminal execution approvals, and learning how to safely pause, redirect, and resume an agent task.

courses.title: AGY-201: Standalone Operations (L200)
courses.description: Managing asynchronous agent boards, prompt engineering for document generation, and tracking web-scraper visual playback tapes inside antigravity.

courses.title: AGY-202: AGY CLI Operations (L200)
courses.description: Mastering global command line syntax, piping local folder inputs, executing bulk file modifications, and running rapid query batch jobs inside agy.

courses.title: AGY-203: Interactive Workspaces (L200)
courses.description: Synchronous side-by-side co-authoring, workspace markdown navigation, and live text rewriting or code refactoring inside antigravity-ide.

courses.title: AGY-311: Scripting with the SDK (L300)
courses.description: Programmatic automation. Triggering agent cycles, passing context arrays, and handling outputs using Python and Node.js SDK libraries.

courses.title: AGY-411: Custom MCP Servers (L400)
courses.description: Designing, hosting, and deploying custom Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers to let agents safely read custom databases and API endpoints.

courses.title: AGY-321: Jules VM Orchestration (L300)
courses.description: Spawning Jules virtual machine instances to run complex, isolated build pipelines and testing jobs across remote pools.

courses.title: AGY-421: Enterprise Governance & Rules (L400)
courses.description: Codifying compliance guidelines, security boundaries, and architectural patterns inside local workspace .gemini.md rules.

courses.title: AGY-331: Advanced Container Sandboxing (L300)
courses.description: Configuring local distrobox or devcontainers environments using the portable agy-box OCI image to run high-autonomy agent loops.

courses.title: AGY-431: Scale & Immutable DevOps (L400)
courses.description: Deploying agy-box images to remote cloud VMs, setting up private container registries under corporate proxies, and running headless pipeline runs.
